0.text: Diffuse cylindrical and varicose bronchiectatic changes in both lungs

2.text: Consolidation areas in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

3.text: Consolidation areas in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

4.text: Consolidation areas in the laterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

5.text: Tree-in-bud appearance in the right upper lobe

6.text: Tree-in-bud appearance in both lower lobes

7.text: Tree-in-bud appearance in the apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe

8.text: Acinar opacities in the right upper lobe

9.text: Acinar opacities in both lower lobes

10.text: Acinar opacities in the apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe

11.text: Mosaic attenuation pattern in both lungs
